_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: Following a 24 h exposure to 10 μM FT895, the levels of mtDNA-CN based on both ND2 and ND4L genes exhibited a significant reduction in all four different MPNST cells
details: Significant reduction in mtDNA-CN levels based on both ND2 and ND4L genes after 24h exposure to 10 μM FT895
